response.justification: Exceptional fit with 11+ years of full-stack experience directly matching the role's primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB) and currently contributing to AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq. Strong backend systems expertise from handling microservices at scale, computer science degree, and proven delivery across web, mobile, and infrastructure. Only minor gaps: Nest.js, Vitest, and Playwright not explicitly mentioned, though backend depth and testing background exceed requirements.
strengths: Currently Staff Engineer at re:cinq contributing to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks—exact alignment with emerging role requirements
11+ years full-stack mastery with exceptional backend credentials: microservices at 1M+ req/s, high-performance databases, Kubernetes deployments, Docker
Core stack fluency: TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, SQL, Git, AWS CDK, with CS degree and proven ability to design and scale systems
concerns: Nest.js not explicitly mentioned in recent roles despite extensive backend framework experience across DLang, Node.js, and GraphQL
Testing frameworks Vitest and Playwright not called out, though strong TDD background and testing workshops demonstrate solid testing discipline
Currently Staff Engineer at same company; this Senior IC role may represent lateral or downward move, raising questions about motivation or team/scope differences

key_factors.factor: Already embedded at re:cinq with direct AI-agent and infrastructure experience
Proven mastery of primary stack across 11 years
